name: samesake-workspace

scripts.build: for d in packages/sdk packages/server packages/cli packages/mcp; do (cd "$d" && bun run build) || exit 1; done
scripts.release:publish: bun run build && for dir in packages/*; do [ -f "$dir/package.json" ] && (cd "$dir" && bun publish || true); done && changeset tag

//overrides: Porulle 0.1.0 adapters publish '@porulle/core: workspace:*' (alpha publish bug); pin it to a real version so npm consumers can resolve it.
